slug: # The employer universe `scripts/feed.py` watches. Every row's ATS accepts an
# application with NO account — so anything sourced here is directly submittable
# with the driver named in the `ats` column (sites/<ats>/).
# slug    the company's board slug on that ATS (the bit in its careers URL).
# ats     greenhouse | lever | ashby | workable | smartrecruiters | recruitee
# name    display name (lands in the tracker's Company column).
# sector  pipe-separated tags; filter with `--sector music
#         Tags in use: design research music devops security fintech saas consumer
#         media health ai data ecommerce travel energy agency cms devtools purpose.
# ⚠️ ONE ROW PER COMPANY. Several firms answer on two ATSes (Skyscanner

ats: Peak) — listing both double-sources the same job under two ids.
